summary: Iteration 46: Multi-Campus Admin Access & Health Scores - All 10 features verified. Backend: 22/22 tests pass. Frontend: Campus switcher UI verified working for Shannon, correctly hidden for Jacob.

health_scores.GET /api/platform/health-scores (platfor: PASS - Returns all churches with health scores

frontend_campus_switcher.dropdown_shows_3_campuses: PASS - Abundant East, Downtown, West options visible
frontend_campus_switcher.campus_switch_updates_ui: PASS - Clicking different campus updates dashboard
frontend_campus_switcher.jacob_no_campus_switcher: PASS - Member does not see campus switcher

critical_code_review_comments: AppShell.jsx correctly implements campus switcher with DropdownMenu component
Campus switcher only shows when user.accessible_campuses.length > 1
Backend /auth/switch-campus correctly validates user has access to target campus
Backend /auth/me correctly includes active_tenant_id after campus switch
Health scores endpoint correctly requires platform_admin role
All Abundant campuses have A+ scores (100), non-Abundant have F scores (<40)
seed_data_creation: Shannon and Jacob accounts already existed in database with correct permissions and multi-campus access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified multi-campus admin access for Shannon Nieman (Lead Pastor at Abundant Church). Shannon has church_admin role with 38 permissions and can switch between 3 Abundant campuses (East, Downtown, West) via the campus switcher dropdown in the top bar. Jacob Pacheco is a member at Abundant East with 11 member permissions and NO multi-campus access. Health scores endpoint (/api/platform/health-scores) requires platform_admin role and shows Abundant churches with A+ scores (100) and non-Abundant churches with F scores (<40). Rate limiting is active (5 logins/min per IP) - use session caching in tests.

mocked_apis_list: All 6 payment processors (Stripe, Pushpay, Tithe.ly, Planning Center, Subsplash, Manual) - return realistic fake responses
